IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (25905275.pdf)
SUMMARY: Professional and personable in relating to customer and coworkers, over 10 years' experience in customer relations, excellent verbal and written communication skills. Dependable, responsible contributor committed to excellence and success.
SKILLS: Microsoft Office, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Remedy, IBM ticketing system, Windows 7, Customer service, Technical support, Leadership, Problem solving skills, Project management, Network administration, Multi-tasking, Hardware, Electrical wiring, Spanish
